components.description: the parameters used to calculate a ranking

components.description: list sorted by the calculated ranking

components.description: show the most relevant definitions related to a problem

components.description: show the most relevant exchange rates

components.description: the object description as read only

components.description: show the plural form of a word as read only text

components.description: show the phrase type of a word as read only text

components.description: show the language specific sub title and the number how many times the object has been used

components.name: parents of word
components.description: list of words or triples that lead to this word

components.description: list of words or triples where this word leading to

components.name: phrase aliases
components.description: show the phrases that are an alias of this phrase

components.description: show the symbols of this phrase

components.description: list of phrases related to this phrase excluding the alias and symbol entries

components.name: system sub title values
components.description: show the language specific sub title for a value list

components.description: show the language specific sub title for a reference list

components.description: changeable list of reference of this word

components.name: system sub title log
components.description: show the language specific sub title for the change log

components.name: change log word
components.description: show the change log of this word
